author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

These read non-RAW input files. The Run 3 PU workflows are unlikely to be revived in 20_1_X, so they are removed.

I had missed these in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50954.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2278

#### PR validation:

I checked `runTheMatrix.py -w gpu -n` without and with this PR. The 32 workflows failing in the 20_[01]_X GPU tests because of `DictionaryNotFound` are removed from the list of workflows.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

To be backported to 20_0_X.
title: Remove Run 3 PU and disable Run 4 PU GPU workflows
